title: SPRD-1319 My older wife before my remarriage partner is good ... Noriko Yada
description: A few years ago, I got married to my young and well-mannered wife. It should have been smooth sailing. I didn't know when I was dating, but my wife has a lot of money, just playing around and looking down on me lately. Obviously, there is no night life. When I got home, I didn't have a place to stay and I was wondering what to do in the future. At that time, the workplace I received by chance was my ex-wife's house. In front of my ex-wife, I honestly apologized for that time. Noriko has gone away because she couldn't grow up. When the work was over, I remembered when I was married with Noriko. I was attracted to each other like a magnet and loved each other over and over again. I stared at Noriko seriously. I just hugged Noriko with the scent of a woman who was whipping from that time. Play with Noriko's body and attack where she liked. I hated and tried to escape, but I was irresistibly excited because I was as sensitive as I used to be. And when I inserted it halfway, I accepted me smoothly as if I had been waiting until now ...
